Kakuna

#0013 Weedle #0015 Beedrill
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Kakuna is a Bug/Poison type Pokémon introduced in Generation 1.

Kakuna

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0014
Type Bug Poison
Species Cocoon Pokémon
Height 0.6 m (2′00″)
Weight 10.0 kg (22.0 lbs)
Abilities 1. Shed Skin
Local № 0014 (Red/Blue/Yellow)
0028 (Gold/Silver/Crystal)
0014 (FireRed/LeafGreen)
0028 (HeartGold/SoulSilver)
0027 (X/Y — Central Kalos)
0014 (Let's Go Pikachu/Let's Go Eevee)
0019 (Legends: Z-A)

Training

EV yield 2 Defense
Catch rate 120 (15.7% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 72
Growth Rate Medium Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Bug
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 15 (3,599–3,855 steps)

Base stats

HP 45
200 294
Attack 25
49 163
Defense 50
94 218
Sp. Atk 25
49 163
Sp. Def 25
49 163
Speed 35
67 185
Total 205 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Evolution chart

#0013
Weedle
Bug · Poison
(Level 7)
#0014
Kakuna
Bug · Poison
(Level 10)
#0015
Beedrill
Bug · Poison

Kakuna changes

  • In Generation 1, Kakuna has a base Special stat of 25.
  • In Generations 1-4, Kakuna has a base experience yield of 71.
  • In Generations 2-7, Kakuna has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Red
Blue		 Almost incapable of moving, this POKéMON can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators.
Yellow Able to move only slightly. When endangered, it may stick out its stinger and poison its enemy.
Gold Although it is a cocoon, it can move a little. It can extend its poison barb if it is attacked.
Silver From this form, it will grow into an adult. As its body becomes softer, the external shell hardens.
Crystal Nearly incapable of movement, it leans against stout trees while waiting for its evolution.
Ruby
Sapphire		 KAKUNA remains virtually immobile as it clings to a tree. However, on the inside, it is extremely busy as it prepares for its coming evolution. This is evident from how hot the shell becomes to the touch.
FireRed This POKéMON is in a temporary stage while making its body. It is almost completely unable to move on its own.
LeafGreen Almost incapable of moving, this POKéMON can only harden its shell to protect itself when it is in danger.
Emerald It remains virtually immobile while it clings to a tree. However, on the inside, it busily prepares for evolution. This is evident from how hot its shell becomes.
Diamond
Pearl
Platinum		 While awaiting evolution, it hides from predators under leaves and in nooks of branches.
HeartGold Although it is a cocoon, it can move a little. It can extend its poison barb if it is attacked.
SoulSilver From this form, it will grow into an adult. As its body becomes softer, the external shell hardens.
Black
White
Black 2
White 2		 While awaiting evolution, it hides from predators under leaves and in nooks of branches.
X Almost incapable of moving, this Pokémon can only harden its shell to protect itself when it is in danger.
Y While awaiting evolution, it hides from predators under leaves and in nooks of branches.
Omega Ruby
Alpha Sapphire		 Kakuna remains virtually immobile as it clings to a tree. However, on the inside, it is extremely busy as it prepares for its coming evolution. This is evident from how hot the shell becomes to the touch.
Let's Go Pikachu
Let's Go Eevee		 Able to move only slightly. When endangered, it may stick out its stinger and poison its enemy.
Brilliant Diamond
Shining Pearl		 While awaiting evolution, it hides from predators under leaves and in nooks of branches.

Egg moves

Kakuna does not learn any moves by breeding in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond & Shining Pearl.

Moves learnt by TM

Kakuna cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond & Shining Pearl.

Answers to Kakuna questions

  • Is it possibly to beat my friends Weedle with my Kakuna even tho it’s Movepool sucks?
  • Can you get Sniper Beedrill by catching Kakuna in the Friend Safari?
  • Is it physically possible to get Sniper Beedrill in XY / ORAS?

Other languages

English Kakuna
Japanese コクーン (Cocoon)
German Kokuna
French Coconfort
Italian Kakuna
Spanish Kakuna
Korean 딱충이 (ttakchungi)
Chinese (Simplified) 铁壳蛹
Chinese (Traditional) 鐵殼蛹

 

English Cocoon Pokémon
Japanese さなぎポケモン
German Kokon-Pokémon
French Pokémon Cocon
Italian Pokémon Bozzolo
Spanish Pokémon Capullo
Korean 번데기포켓몬

Chinese (Traditional) 蛹寶可夢

Name origin

cocoon
a pupal casing made by some insects
